{{CargoOrgan
|name=Scorpion Tail
|type=Bionic
|rank=blue
|id=10656
|idx=13
|description=The ghastly stinger drips with necrotic venom, a reaper's scythe whispering promises of agonizing demise through its very aura.
|skill=On combat start, summon a Scorpion to attack the enemy, dealing DMG equal to 54% of ATK!
|hp=710
|def=85
|atk=157
|rush=104
|gene1=During exploration, Fire DMG +60
|gene2=In explorations, {race} ATK +20
|gene3=In explorations, DMG +2.5%
|gene7=Fire DMG +90 (Awakened)
|}}
